expert.title: Cycles and memory resources usage
expert.txt:
Assuming all data fit into the L1 cache, each call to the function takes 15.75 cycles. At this rate:
  • 0% of peak load performance is reached (0.25 out of 64.00 bytes loaded per cycle (GB/s @ 1GHz))
  • 2% of peak store performance is reached (0.76 out of 32.00 bytes stored per cycle (GB/s @ 1GHz))

expert.title: Front-end bottlenecks
expert.txt:
Performance is limited by instruction throughput (loading/decoding program instructions to execution core) (front-end is a bottleneck).

By removing all these bottlenecks, you can lower the cost of an iteration from 15.75 to 8.00 cycles (1.97x speedup).
